title: festuca elatior var. pratensis
intro: Festuca elatior var. pratensis, also known as tall fescue, is a variety of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Festuca elatior var. pratensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Festuca elatior var. pratensis can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
